query:
ALTER TABLE review_submissions 
  ADD COLUMN isPaidSubmission TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN paidSubmissionType ENUM('basic', 'skip') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN paidSubmissionConfirmed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
